name: callbell-sysadmin
description: Server-manager pack for callbell: a passive safety layer plus on-demand server-ops skills, active where a host identity is declared.

interface.shortDescription: Server-manager pack: safety layer plus server-ops skills
interface.longDescription: Adds a passive server safety layer and on-demand skills for setting up, hardening, backing up, and operating servers and Docker stacks. Active on a host that declares its identity in __callbell__/.host-identity; otherwise nothing server-specific loads. Requires the callbell core.
defaultPrompt: Set up backups for this server.
